'''Lunasa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], who operated in the years prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. The body armor she wore appeared to be [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] in origin.

==Biography==
Lunasa was one of the group of bounty hunters assembled by [[Magus (bounty hunter)|Magus]] to hunt down a young boy named [[Talesan Fry]], who had discovered their plans for the assassination of twenty galactic leaders at a conference on [[Rondai-2]]. She was able to infiltrate the [[Ulta Center]] by disguising herself. The bounty hunters found themselves pursued by a group of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]]. After confronting the Jedi, she was forced to surrender and was taken into custody.

==Appearances==
*[[Secrets of the Jedi (novel)|''Secrets of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
